articles.title: Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson Reacts to Ledger Controversy: "Don't Break Social Contracts"
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson expresses his stance on Ledger’s controversial ‘Recover’ update.

articles.title: Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson Slams Ethereum Classic As “A Fraudulent Project With No Vision”
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) Founder, Charles Hoskinson, has taken to Twitter to claim that Ethereum Classic (ETC) is now a “scam” and has no “purpose other than to allow insiders to dump their holdings” on unsuspecting investors. Hoskinson, who previously worked with ETC, stated that the project has “no roadmap, innovation, team, or vision”, and is only […]

articles.title: Cardano Gears Up to Catch Ethereum as it deploys 1K Smart Contracts in 2023
articles.description: Cardano could be closing in on its pursuit of Ethereum as its revvs up smart contract deployment.

articles.title: Your Old Game Boy Can Now Be Turned Into a Bitcoin and Ethereum Hardware Wallet
articles.description: Crypto startup Keyp is creating an offline crypto storage solution with a Game Boy cartridge that gamifies the seed phrase process.

articles.title: Cardano’s Hoskinson calls Ethereum Classic ‘scam’ after Ergo’s exclusion from Proof-of-Work Summit
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) founder Charles Hoskinson described Ethereum Classic (ETC) as a scam project whose only purpose is for insiders to dump on recruits with false hopes. Ergo not invited to proof-of-work summit The statement was made in reaction to ETC Cooperative’s refusal to invite Ergo (ERG) to a Proof of Work summit organized by it and […]

articles.title: $0.001 Shiba Inu Price Beckons As Shibarium Launch Proves To Be A Game-Changer For SHIB
articles.description: Despite a recent lacklustre performance, Shiba Inu, the cryptocurrency that gained popularity in late 2021, still has a dedicated community of supporters who remain optimistic about its future trajectory and price breakout to the highly-coveted $0.001 price.

articles.title: Ripple’s Brad Garlinghouse Blames Confusing U.S. Crypto Rules for Flow of Investment to Europe and Asia
articles.description: In a recent CNBC interview, Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse underlined the regulatory uncertainty that U.S. cryptocurrency companies must deal with.

articles.title: Ethereum Layer 2 Mantle Network merges with backer BitDAO
articles.description: BitDAO, a prominent decentralized autonomous organization known for its sizable treasury, announced a merger with Mantle Network.

articles.title: Swaprum DEX team disappears with $3 million in apparent exit scam on Arbitrum network
articles.description: Swaprum, a decentralized exchange on Ethereum Layer 2 network Arbitrum, appears to have absconded with $3 million in user deposits.
